====Pokémon====
{{MissingInfo|2|java|enva|scope=section}}
This listing is of Wallace's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wallace
|pkmn=Milotic
|type1=Water
|img=Wallace Milotic.png
|epnum=DP075
|epname=Our Cup Runneth Over!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Milotic}} is Wallace's first known Pokémon. It first appeared with its Trainer at "Sinnoh Now", when Dawn was watching TV. Previously, Milotic had helped Wallace become a Contest Master with the help of its beauty and skill. It first debuted in ''[[DP075|Our Cup Runneth Over!]]'' when Wallace had a secret training session with it out on a lake. {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} came across them and were impressed with its beauty and graceful moves. Milotic even gave {{AP|Pikachu}} and {{TP|Dawn|Piplup}} a ride around the lake on its back. Later, Wallace did a practice appeal with his Pokémon for the gang and the Team Rocket trio.

Milotic helped Wallace make his sensational entrance to the [[Wallace Cup]]. It is clear that Wallace's fans also have a great love for Milotic as they went wild when it appeared. It even helped pass out the Ribbon to {{an|Dawn}} after she won the Wallace Cup.

It appeared in a fantasy in ''[[BW093|Goodbye, Junior Cup - Hello Adventure!]]''.

It appeared again in ''[[JN105|Reuniting for the First Time!]]'', where it was used in a battle against Ash and {{AP|Pikachu}}. Milotic is eventually defeated by Pikachu, securing Ash's victory in the battle.

Milotic's known moves are {{m|Aqua Ring}}, {{m|Safeguard}}, {{m|Dragon Pulse}}, {{m|Twister}}, and {{m|Hydro Pump}}.}}
